description: Insert a use-after-free by introducing a free() call on a pointer before its last dereference within the same function scope. The mutation inserts the free() immediately before a dereference site, leaving the subsequent access as a use of freed memory.

metadata.notes: Temporal safety violation. Harder to detect statically than off-by-one overflows because the free and use may appear syntactically far apart. Good stress test for inter-procedural analysis and taint tracking tools.
